courses.name: Logistics Principles Paper
courses.description: Mid-career logistics officer writing assignment. Maps directly to the Student Written Assignment Examples dataset on the LOGCOM portal (assignment .docx + rubric .xlsx + sample submissions).
courses.governing_authority: Privacy Act of 1974 (5 U.S.C. § 552a) and DoDI 1322.35 "Military Education Records"

courses.name: Sergeants Course (Resident, SNCO Academy)
courses.school: Staff NCO Academy, MCB Quantico VA
courses.description: Resident NCO PME for E-5 Sergeants per MCO 1553.4B (PME framework). The legacy Squad Leader Distance Learning content has been folded into resident Sergeants Course (E-5) and Corporals Course (E-4); SQDL is no longer a current standalone PME pathway. Discussion forums + 4 written checks.
courses.tr_manual: MCO 1553.4B (PME Framework) and DoDI 1322.35 "Military Education" — anchored to NAVMC 3500.18 Infantry T&R for tactical events
courses.governing_authority: Privacy Act of 1974 (5 U.S.C. § 552a) and DoDI 1322.35 "Military Education Records"

courses.name: MOS 0411 Sustainment Pipeline
courses.description: Maintenance Management Specialist (0411) PMOS pipeline — class V/IX planning, preventive-maintenance scheduling, GCSS-MC interaction.
courses.governing_authority: Privacy Act of 1974 (5 U.S.C. § 552a) and DoDI 1322.35 "Military Education Records"
